name: MAGELLAN COPPER & GOLD Corp
business: The company is a mineral exploration company engaged in the acquisition and exploration of mineral resources, primarily copper and gold. It has not yet determined whether its properties contain economically recoverable reserves and has generated no revenue. The company relies on the sale of securities and borrowings to fund operations.

exposures.sentence: Our future profitability will be affected by changes in the prices of metals, including copper and gold.
Our principal business is the acquisition and exploration of mineral resources.
